scripts.dev:concurrently: concurrently --raw --kill-others-on-fail -n shared,backend,frontend -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:shared" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.cleanup: taskkill //F //T //IM node.exe || echo 没有 node 进程
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
